metadata.description: Tests whether case-rich languages have longer sentences AND larger rank shifts between naive/standardized DDM

verdict.summary: Case richness → sentence length: rho=0.0179, p=0.7527073959373215. Sentence length → rank shift: rho=0.2416, p=1.4995436929433582e-05. Mediation evidence: no. Overall: Mechanism NOT supported.
